docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 735204 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA THRIFT CO A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TAJDAR, KAZEM AKA TAJDAR, KAZEM SEIED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA THRIFT CO A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAJDAR, KAZEM AKA TAJDAR, KAZEM SEIED $936.29 PRINCIPAL, $875.30 INTEREST, $36.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,847.89, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT, CASE # 735204 RENDERED ON JANUARY 7, 1994, IN SAN FRANCISCO.
